title: hieracium subamplifolium
intro: Hieracium subamplifolium, also known as Hawkweed, is a small perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Hawkweed can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat various health conditions.
